items.title: Microsoft says the price of Xbox consoles will increase on August 1 by $100 for 512GB models and $150 for 1TB models, the third price increase since 2025 (Kenneth Shepard/Kotaku)
items.title_original: Microsoft says the price of Xbox consoles will increase on August 1 by $100 for 512GB models and $150 for 1TB models, the third price increase since 2025 (Kenneth Shepard/Kotaku)
items.title_en: Microsoft says the price of Xbox consoles will increase on August 1 by $100 for 512GB models and $150 for 1TB models, the third price increase since 2025 (Kenneth Shepard/Kotaku)
items.title_zh: 微軟表示，Xbox 遊戲機的價格將於 8 月 1 日上漲，512GB 機型價格上漲 100 美元，1TB 機型上漲 150 美元，這是自 2025 年以來第三次漲價（Kenneth Shepard/Kotaku）
items.title_bilingual: 微軟表示，Xbox 遊戲機的價格將於 8 月 1 日上漲，512GB 機型價格上漲 100 美元，1TB 機型上漲 150 美元，這是自 2025 年以來第三次漲價（Kenneth Shepard/Kotaku） / Microsoft says the price of Xbox consoles will increase on August 1 by $100 for 512GB models and $150 for 1TB models, the third price increase since 2025 (Kenneth Shepard/Kotaku)

items.title: Google launches a Google Finance app for Android, with market data, financial news, and an AI-powered "Key Moments" feature, and plans an iOS version this year (Aisha Malik/TechCrunch)
items.title_original: Google launches a Google Finance app for Android, with market data, financial news, and an AI-powered "Key Moments" feature, and plans an iOS version this year (Aisha Malik/TechCrunch)
items.title_en: Google launches a Google Finance app for Android, with market data, financial news, and an AI-powered "Key Moments" feature, and plans an iOS version this year (Aisha Malik/TechCrunch)
items.title_zh: 谷歌推出了 Android 版 Google 財經應用，提供市場數據、財經新聞和人工智慧驅動的「關鍵時刻」功能，並計劃今年推出 iOS 版本（Aisha Malik/TechCrunch）
items.title_bilingual: 谷歌推出了 Android 版 Google 財經應用，提供市場數據、財經新聞和人工智慧驅動的「關鍵時刻」功能，並計劃今年推出 iOS 版本（Aisha Malik/TechCrunch） / Google launches a Google Finance app for Android, with market data, financial news, and an AI-powered "Key Moments" feature, and plans an iOS version this year (Aisha Malik/TechCrunch)

items.title: Sources: Bumble explores a sale amid slowing growth in the online dating sector; its shares fell 48% over the past 12 months, giving it a market cap of $388M (Milana Vinn/Reuters)

items.title_en: Sources: Bumble explores a sale amid slowing growth in the online dating sector; its shares fell 48% over the past 12 months, giving it a market cap of $388M (Milana Vinn/Reuters)
items.title_zh: 資料來源：Bumble 在線上約會產業成長放緩的情況下探索出售；過去 12 個月，股價下跌 48%，市值達到 3.88 億美元（Milana Vinn/Reuters）
items.title_bilingual: 資料來源：Bumble 在線上約會產業成長放緩的情況下探索出售；過去 12 個月，股價下跌 48%，市值達到 3.88 億美元（Milana Vinn/Reuters） / Sources: Bumble explores a sale amid slowing growth in the online dating sector; its shares fell 48% over the past 12 months, giving it a market cap of $388M (Milana Vinn/Reuters)

items.title_en: Sources: Apple plans to skip higher-end M6 chips and launch its next Pro and Max chips in 2027 as part of the M7 lineup, to boost on-device AI capabilities (Mark Gurman/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 來源：蘋果計劃跳過高階 M6 晶片，並於 2027 年推出下一代 Pro 和 Max 晶片，作為 M7 系列的一部分，以增強設備上的 AI 功能（Mark Gurman/彭博社）

items.title: General Intuition, which trains AI agents in spatial reasoning via gameplay footage, raised $320M led by Khosla at a $2.3B valuation, for $454M in total funding (Rebecca Bellan/TechCrunch)
items.title_original: General Intuition, which trains AI agents in spatial reasoning via gameplay footage, raised $320M led by Khosla at a $2.3B valuation, for $454M in total funding (Rebecca Bellan/TechCrunch)
items.title_en: General Intuition, which trains AI agents in spatial reasoning via gameplay footage, raised $320M led by Khosla at a $2.3B valuation, for $454M in total funding (Rebecca Bellan/TechCrunch)
items.title_zh: General Intuition 透過遊戲畫面訓練人工智慧代理商進行空間推理，在 Khosla 的帶領下以 2.3B 美元的估值籌集了 3.2 億美元，總融資額為 4.54 億美元（Rebecca Bellan/TechCrunch）

items.title: Sail, whose software optimizes how AI models run on existing chips, emerges from stealth with $80M in seed and Series A led by Kleiner at a $450M valuation (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)
items.title_original: Sail, whose software optimizes how AI models run on existing chips, emerges from stealth with $80M in seed and Series A led by Kleiner at a $450M valuation (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)
items.title_en: Sail, whose software optimizes how AI models run on existing chips, emerges from stealth with $80M in seed and Series A led by Kleiner at a $450M valuation (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)
items.title_zh: Sail 的軟體優化了人工智慧模型在現有晶片上的運作方式，在 Kleiner 領投的 A 輪融資和 8000 萬美元的種子輪融資中脫穎而出，估值達到 4.5 億美元（Lily Mae Lazarus/《財富》）
items.title_bilingual: Sail 的軟體優化了人工智慧模型在現有晶片上的運作方式，在 Kleiner 領投的 A 輪融資和 8000 萬美元的種子輪融資中脫穎而出，估值達到 4.5 億美元（Lily Mae Lazarus/《財富》） / Sail, whose software optimizes how AI models run on existing chips, emerges from stealth with $80M in seed and Series A led by Kleiner at a $450M valuation (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)

items.title: Apple says "the rapid expansion of AI data centers has created an extraordinary surge in demand for memory and storage"; the MacBook Neo rises from $599 to $699 (Mark Gurman/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Apple says "the rapid expansion of AI data centers has created an extraordinary surge in demand for memory and storage"; the MacBook Neo rises from $599 to $699 (Mark Gurman/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Apple says "the rapid expansion of AI data centers has created an extraordinary surge in demand for memory and storage"; the MacBook Neo rises from $599 to $699 (Mark Gurman/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 蘋果表示，「人工智慧資料中心的快速擴張導致記憶體和儲存的需求激增」； MacBook Neo 從 599 美元漲至 699 美元（Mark Gurman/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 蘋果表示，「人工智慧資料中心的快速擴張導致記憶體和儲存的需求激增」； MacBook Neo 從 599 美元漲至 699 美元（Mark Gurman/彭博社） / Apple says "the rapid expansion of AI data centers has created an extraordinary surge in demand for memory and storage"; the MacBook Neo rises from $599 to $699 (Mark Gurman/Bloomberg)

items.title: Apple raises Mac, iPad, and other product prices by 15%-25%, saying it has "never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly"; iPhone is unchanged (Rolfe Winkler/Wall Street Journal)

items.title_en: Apple raises Mac, iPad, and other product prices by 15%-25%, saying it has "never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly"; iPhone is unchanged (Rolfe Winkler/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: 蘋果將Mac、iPad和其他產品價格提高15%-25%，並表示「從未見過零件價格上漲如此之快」； iPhone 沒有變化（Rolfe Winkler/華爾街日報）
items.title_bilingual: 蘋果將Mac、iPad和其他產品價格提高15%-25%，並表示「從未見過零件價格上漲如此之快」； iPhone 沒有變化（Rolfe Winkler/華爾街日報） / Apple raises Mac, iPad, and other product prices by 15%-25%, saying it has "never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly"; iPhone is unchanged (Rolfe Winkler/Wall Street Journal)

items.title_en: Scaled Cognition, a reliability-focused lab that develops the Agentic Pretrained Transformer model, raised a $100M Series A led by Khosla at a $750M valuation (Steven Rosenbush/Wall Street Journal)

items.title_zh: 指數觀點：第一季全球人工智慧銷售額（不包括中國）達到 25B 美元，超過資料中心和晶片折舊成本估計的 21B 美元；利潤率仍然很低（Jacob Reid/Bloomberg）

items.title: Paris-based Tsuga, whose observability software runs in customers' own clouds to help them skip per-byte ingestion costs, raised a $35M Series A led by Singular (Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web)
items.title_original: Paris-based Tsuga, whose observability software runs in customers' own clouds to help them skip per-byte ingestion costs, raised a $35M Series A led by Singular (Ana Maria Constantin/The Next Web)
